race.comment: Lots of these ready to win. ZINOVATION (7) is a progressive type who was good fresh then found one better over 2200m second-up. Looks well placed here and the blinkers go on. Gets chance. CHERON FINALE (13) is a genuine type with two minor placings from three starts this prep. Placed last time over 2100m at Stony Creek. Another overdue and expected to run well again. EARL OF GLOUCESTER (2) ran below expectations last time at Seymour, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths starting at $7. Finds an easier assignment and can find winning form. I AM BONGINO (3) was beaten 8 lengths into fourth at the second run back from a break in a 2200m contest at Seymour at his latest appearance. Further improved and among the main chances. FINANCE MERCHANT (9) has been runner-up last two. Has ability and should run well.
